source_title: Sudan declares an end to its cholera outbreak
notes: Outbreak spread to all 18 states; risk drivers included WASH disruption, displacement, flooding, and limited health-care access.

source_title: Democratic Republic of the Congo: WHO Health Emergency Appeal 2026
notes: Combined epidemic burden across cholera, mpox, measles, Ebola, polio and other communicable diseases.

source_title: South Sudan Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
notes: HNRP says the country faced cholera, hepatitis E and mpox, with 6.3 million needing health assistance in 2026.

primary_crisis: War, famine, and infectious disease risk
source_title: Public Health Situation Analysis - occupied Palestinian territory (September 2025)
notes: WHO PHSA reports 63k+ deaths, 161k+ injuries, 2.1M people in need in Gaza, and 1.4M requiring emergency shelter.

source_title: PAHO cholera flare-up + UN/OHCHR Haiti violence snapshots
notes: 372 suspected cholera cases and 17 deaths in Petion-Ville; separate UN reporting cited 4,864 deaths from gang violence between Oct 2024 and Jun 2025.
